text_original: I think the chat messages are limiting and find myself switching to other apps. It's difficult to get invested in a story when I keep getting "Frozen Out"... UPDATE: I still keep being locked out. The 12 hour lockout is extremely immersion-breaking. I'm not comfortable paying the subscription even if I could. Edit: Is there any update to improvements lately?
text_zh: 我觉得聊天消息限制太多，发现自己不得不切换到其他应用。当一直被“冻结”时，很难沉浸在故事中……更新：我还是经常被锁。12小时的锁定非常破坏沉浸感。即使我付得起，也不愿意支付订阅费用。编辑：最近有什么改进更新吗？
reply_original: Hi! Thank you for the update. We hear you—the 12-hour limit is indeed immersion-breaking. This exists due to high AI server costs, but we are actively working on ways to offer more free messages. We've recently upgraded our memory system and model logic to make chats more engaging. Please email support@fantachat.ai so we can help further!
reply_zh: 嗨！感谢您的反馈。我们明白您的感受——12小时的限制确实很影响沉浸感。设置这一限制是因为AI服务器成本较高，但我们正在积极探索提供更多免费消息的方法。我们最近升级了记忆系统和模型逻辑，以使聊天更具吸引力。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们为您提供进一步帮助！
